prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-KP-RCLIGHTUPFIRETRUCK-RED Product Type: NON_RIDING_TOY_VEHICLE Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio 16 Inch Remote Control Fire Truck Firefighter Rescue Vehicle, Boys, Red, Ages 3+ Description: Calling all little firefighters in training. This awesome remote control fire truck from Kidplokio features bright lights, an easy to use remote control unit, an extending rescue ladder with bucket for a small action figure, and lastly, fast wheels so kids can race to the rescue and be first on the scene.

Measuring 16 inches, the remote control fire truck is a great toy for young kids to handle and manage safely. Made from durable and high-quality plastic, the fire truck will stand up to lots of wear and tear. The handheld remote control unit or controller measures 6 x 5 inches with easy to reach buttons, designed with small hands in mind.

Whether kids are rescuing the neighborhood cat, fighting a local fire or zooming across the city to assist with a skyscraper rescue mission, hours of pretend play await. And, in addition to lots of fun pretend play with family and friends, kids will be engaging in crucial early developmental activities when playing with the remote control truck, like working their fine and gross motor skills, as well as provoking their cognitive development with imaginative playtime sessions.

Let the firefighting rescue missions begin.

Recommended Ages: 3+ Search Terms: semi truck toy christmas gift hanukkah gifts holiday toy list 2021 fire fighter rescue vehicle police kids toddlers RC learning and education toys pretend play cool gifts under 100 dollars Features: - 16 INCH REMOTE CONTROL FIRE TRUCK: Calling all little firefighters in training! This awesome remote control fire truck toy features lights, an easy to use RC unit, an extending rescue ladder with bucket for a small action figure and fast wheels so kids can race to the rescue and be first on the scene! - EASY TO USE REMOTE CONTROL TRUCK: Measuring 16 inches, the remote control fire truck is a fun toy for young kids to handle and manage safely; the remote control unit or controller measures 6 x 5 inches with easy to reach buttons; designed with small hands in mind! - ENDLESS PRETEND PLAY POSSIBILITIES: Whether kids are rescuing the neighborhood cat or zooming downtown to help with a skyscraper rescue mission, hours of pretend play await, as little firefighters race to save the day with this fast moving remote control firefighter truck toy - LEARNING AND EDUCATION TOYS: In addition to lots of fun pretend play with family and friends, kids will be engaging in crucial early developmental activities when playing with the remote control truck, like working their fine and gross motor skills, as well as provoking their cognitive development with imaginative playtime - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 16 x 4 x 7 inches; Color: Red; Weight: 2.2lbs; Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts; Ages: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Kidplokio 16 Inch Remote Control Fire Truck Red

anthropic.title_differentiation: Lights And Sounds, Extending Rescue Ladder, Fast Wheels, Ages 3, Educational Pretend Play
